reduced-research-pipeline.signature: Reduced research agent pipeline in /rapid:new-version SKILL.md (fewer than 6 agents)
reduced-research-pipeline.description: Consolidated research pipeline covering all domains with fewer agent spawns

coverage-preservation.description: Reduced pipeline must still cover all research domains even if consolidated into fewer agents

synthesis-compatibility.description: Synthesizer agent must still receive structured research outputs it can merge

definition.scope: Reduce the number of research agents spawned during /rapid:new-version from 6 to fewer by consolidating overlapping research concerns while preserving coverage quality.

tasks.description: Analyze 6 research agents for overlapping concerns and consolidation opportunities
tasks.acceptance: Clear mapping of which agents can be merged

tasks.description: Consolidate research agents in new-version SKILL.md
tasks.acceptance: Fewer agents spawned while all domains covered

tasks.description: Update synthesizer prompt for consolidated output format
